title: habitable evidence packet — bundle.json (v1)
description: The machine-readable contract for the bundle.json at the root of a habitable evidence packet. Stable per the compatibility policy in docs/bundle-schema.md: additive within a major packet_version; a breaking change is a major bump. The signed sibling file bundle.sig.json is described by $defs/signature. Hashes are lowercase hex SHA-256 (64 chars); the chain-of-custody genesis prev_hash is 64 zeros.

packet_version.description: Packet format version. A verifier accepts 1..SUPPORTED_PACKET_VERSION and rejects newer-than-supported packets rather than mis-verifying.

since.description: Lower bound on capture time; may be empty.

statement.description: Human-readable minimal-disclosure scope summary (e.g. 'Scope: issue <id> only …' or 'Scope: the whole unit …'). Also rendered, localized, in packet.html/packet.pdf; see docs/legal/minimal-disclosure.md.

exclusions.description: Explicit statements of what this export does NOT include (vault contents outside the scope; items captured before 'since' when set). Defensible against over-broad discovery (item R-35).

generated_at.description: Packet generation time, ISO 8601 UTC, e.g. 2026-01-02T00:00:00Z.

language.description: BCP 47-ish language tag of the rendered packet, e.g. en, es.

disclosures.description: Human-readable notes of what the packet reveals (e.g. location stripped from shared copies; custody identities not exported; sealed originals embedded with full metadata). Also rendered, localized, in packet.html/packet.pdf.

hexSha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 digest (64 chars). The custody genesis prev_hash is 64 zeros.

category.description: e.g. heat, mold, pests, water, electrical, structural.

hlc.description: Ordering token. Opaque, per-case-salted digest in packet_version >= 2 (no wall-clock/node metadata); the raw wall_ms.counter.node_id HLC stamp in v1.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 of the sealed original; the value the RFC 3161 token is taken over.

shared_name.description: Filename under media/ of the location-stripped shared copy; empty if none.

shared_hash.description: SHA-256 of the shared copy; empty when no shared media for this item.

stripped.description: Human-readable note of which metadata was removed from the shared copy (e.g. 'gps', 'none', 'skipped').

has_original.description: Whether the sealed original is embedded under originals/.

timestamp.description: RFC 3161 (or dev) token over content_hash; null while awaiting timestamp.

archive_timestamps.description: Ordered archive (re-)timestamps chaining back to the primary token.

additional_timestamps.description: Independent redundant timestamps from other authorities over the SAME content_hash (not a chain). Provides multiple-authority redundancy: the verifier treats the item as timestamped if at least one authority (primary or additional) verifies. Absent in single-authority packets.

sensor.description: Present (non-null) only for instrument data-file captures (EXP-09, e.g. a temperature-logger or moisture-meter CSV). The readings interpreted from the sealed original for accessible chart+table rendering; the CSV bytes themselves remain the hash-anchored evidence under content_hash. null (or absent) for photo/video captures.

sensorSeries.description: An instrument CSV interpreted into a renderable series (EXP-09). Corroboration only, never proof of cause; the chart is a visual convenience over the readings table, which is the accessible source of truth.

label_header.description: Column name for each reading's label (often a timestamp); 'Reading' when the CSV had no header.

value_header.description: Column name for the numeric value; 'Value' when the CSV had no header. Any trailing '(unit)' is split out into 'unit'.

unit.description: Unit parsed from the value header (e.g. 'F', '%RH'); null if none.

readings.description: Rendered readings, in file order. Capped at 500 rows; see 'truncated'/'total_rows'. Full data remains in the sealed original.

total_rows.description: Total numeric readings parsed (before any truncation).

truncated.description: Whether 'readings' is a truncated prefix of the full series.

warnings.description: Non-fatal parse notes (rows skipped, truncation), surfaced verbatim in the packet.

kind.description: 'dev' is a non-production offline authority; production packets use 'rfc3161'.

custodyProof.description: Identity-stripped, independently checkable proof the chain of custody is intact. Actor identities, salts, and private_details are NOT present (they stay in the union's vault). From packet_version 2, each entry's Ed25519 signature IS present (see $defs/custodyEntry) -- it commits to no identity by itself and lets a verifier bind bundle.sig.json's sign_public to the producer of this chain (FIX-05).

head_hash.description: entry_hash of the last entry, or 64 zeros for an empty chain.

custodyEntry.description: Exported (redacted) custody entry. entry_hash = SHA-256(canonical_json of {seq, action, item_id, hlc, actor_commitment, details(sorted), prev_hash}). From packet_version 2 (FIX-05), 'signature' is also exported so a verifier can bind the bundle-signing key (bundle.sig.json.sign_public) to the identity that produced the custody chain; packet_version 1 entries never carry it.

seq.description: 1-based, strictly increasing position in the chain.

hlc.description: Ordering token. Opaque, per-case-salted digest in packet_version >= 2 (no wall-clock/node metadata); the raw HLC stamp in v1. The exported chain is re-hashed over this value so it still verifies standalone.

actor_commitment.description: Salted commitment SHA-256(salt:actor); the clear actor and salt are vault-only.

details.description: Verification-relevant, non-identifying facts only (hashes, media_type, tsa, etc.). A copied_for_sharing entry carries content_hash + shared_hash + stripped.

prev_hash.description: entry_hash of the previous entry; 64 zeros for the genesis link.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature over entry_hash, made with the acting node's own identity key at capture/export time (packet_version >= 2 only; empty or absent in packet_version 1). Reveals no actor identity by itself -- only that whoever holds the matching private key produced this entry.
Contents of the sibling file bundle.sig.json. The producer's Ed25519 key signs the ASCII hex of bundle_sha256.

bundle_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the exact bundle.json bytes.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature over the ASCII of bundle_sha256.
